arts.ttl: Aston Villa crisis set to end as Unai Emery awaits big injury boost
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Pau Torres could return to action in two weeks' time as Unai Emery looks forward to the end of his side's defensive crisis Unai Emery hopes Aston Villa's defensive crisis will soon be over as Ezri Konsa and Pau Torres close in on respective returns from injury.

arts.ttl: Why Jhon Duran was sent off for Al Nassr as £64m former Aston Villa star shown bizarre red card
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran was shown a red card on just his fourth appearance for Al Nassr - as the Saudi Pro League side suffered just a third loss of the season. For Duran, it was the first defeat he has suffered with Al Nassr since joining the Saudi Pro League powerhouses in a £64m deal from Aston Villa last month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca reveals huge training ground meeting after slump in form
arts.sum: Around 100 staff members, and the first-team squad, were summoned to the meeting

arts.ttl: Latest Chelsea injury news as six miss Aston Villa after Enzo Maresca gives Noni Madueke update
arts.sum: However, the problems are now further forward with Madueke becoming the third attacker Maresca has lost to injury this month after Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu both picked up muscular issues during the 2-1 win against West Ham. The absence of a natural No.9 has been clear in both defeats to Brighton. Enzo Maresca has provided updates on a number of injuries in his Chelsea squad including the one suffered by Noni Madueke against Brighton.

arts.ttl: I saw a different Maresca at Chelsea press conference as message sent to Boehly
arts.sum: "I've always been clear since day one: I'm not here to - and I've said this already a few times - I'm not here to survive, I'm here to win games, I'm here to bring this club to fight for titles," Maresca said, defiantly . In recent weeks, Maresca perhaps went into his shell a bit more - understandably given the Blues' run of form in the Premier League, with two wins from their last nine matches in the competition.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals details of a 100-PERSON meeting at Chelsea - as he admits he 'couldn't sleep' in bid to ensure players knew his season aims
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: The Blues are currently sixth in the Premier League as they travel to Aston Villa on Saturday and know that the positions for Europe's elite competition are likely to go to fifth.

arts.ttl: How Chelsea can use key star to stretch the play and allow Cole Palmer to thrive in the pocket, writes MARTIN KEOWN
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: It was only three months ago that Chelsea were playing in a manner that showed how good the club can be. That was until Enzo Maresca said they were not Premier League contenders

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'breach financial rules' as huge punishment details laid out
arts.sum: Aston Villa are said to be facing a multi-million-pound fine for breaching Uefa's squad cost ratio (SCR) rules during their first season in the Champions League . Aston Villa are spending significantly on player wages and transfers compared to revenue generated by the club and appear set to fall foul of financial regulations

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca drops Tyrique George team selection hint before Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: The teenager could see his senior minutes increase with the Blues without several senior attackers

arts.ttl: Arteta battles Chelsea, Man Utd and Liverpool for IN-DEMAND wonderkids: Arsenal Transfer News Today
arts.sum: Arteta battles Chelsea, Man Utd and Liverpool for IN-DEMAND wonderkids: Arsenal Transfer News Today All the latest transfer news, gossip and rumours from Arsenal as the Gunners fight to beat their rivals to the signings of two major wonderkids.
